productDisplayName: Nike Men Black Speed Cricket T-shirt
description: Style NoteDesigned for your training needs, this nike T-shirt is made of polyester fabric with Dri-Fit technology to offer absolute sweat-free, fresh comfort. Such properties make it ideal not just for training, but playing any sport even on a hot day. Team this with performance shorts and sports shoes or track pants and floaters for unparalleled cool.Product DetailsBlack and fluroscent green T-shirt with round neck, perforations along the sides and the back for breathability and has a Nike swoosh on the left shoulderMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and fitRegular fit
